title: [UI-kit] VcTable - implement VcTableColumn subcomponent for declarative column config (better DX)
verdict_rationale: Two outstanding P2 a11y issues: BUG-2 (Space-key activation on role=button rows on orders.vue) and BUG-A (rowStyle opacity:0.5 dimming reduces contrast to 3.94:1, below WCAG AA 4.5:1). All ACs functionally met: declarative VcTableColumn API renders correctly, sticky/fixed columns work, rowClass/rowStyle work, backward-compat with legacy `columns` prop confirmed, INFRA-1 (Cloudflare Rocket Loader) resolved enabling full Storybook QA. Storybook retest: 36 PASS / 2 FAIL / 2 PARTIAL / 4 NOT COVERED / 1 AMBIGUOUS across 47 assertions. Consumer regression sweep clean. By-design clarifications: window.open _blank row navigation + modifier-key handling are intentional UX, not regressions.

verdict_history.reason: Believed BUG-1 (window.open _blank) was a P1 functional regression
User clarified BUG-1 + BUG-3 are by-design (intentional new-tab navigation). Only BUG-2 (Space-key a11y) remained.

Storybook retest completed (INFRA-1 RESOLVED). Confirmed BUG-2; discovered BUG-A (P2 a11y, WCAG 1.4.3 — rowStyle opacity dimming reduces contrast). 4 items not covered by any Storybook story; 1 ambiguous (fixed-column shadow).

blocked_reason: Only /account/purchase-requests remains blocked (route disabled for TechFlow B2B org). Storybook 33 items now executed (INFRA-1 RESOLVED 2026-05-06).

storybook_retest.infra_1_status: RESOLVED — Cloudflare Rocket Loader blocker cleared on https://vcst-qa-storybook.govirto.com
not_covered_items: 1.5.5 — rowClass + rowStyle coexistence on same table (no dedicated story)
1.8.3 — Sticky header + custom #header slot (no dedicated story)
ambiguous_items: 1.4.6 — Fixed column visual separator/shadow (no box-shadow found in computed styles; Coffee theme may not render a separator)

bugs_to_file.title: Space key does not activate `<tr role="button" tabindex="0">` row on /account/orders (only Enter works)
bugs_to_file.scope: Confirmed Chrome + Firefox on /account/orders + Storybook Row Click story. ARIA APG: role=button MUST respond to both Enter and Space.
bugs_to_file.fix_hint: Add Space (' ') to keydown listener alongside Enter in <VcTable> @row-click keyboard handler; preventDefault to stop page-scroll

bugs_to_file.title: rowStyle `opacity: 0.5` dimming pattern reduces text contrast to 3.94:1 (below WCAG AA 4.5:1)
bugs_to_file.scope: Storybook Row Inline Style story — axe-core reports 3 affected elements (Bob Johnson's name cell, email cell, Inactive badge). Effective color #808080 over white. Source: VCST-4535 Storybook retest 2026-05-06.
bugs_to_file.fix_hint: Replace opacity-dimming for inactive/disabled rows with a higher-contrast token (e.g., text-neutral-600 or a token meeting 4.5:1 on neutral-50/white). Add WCAG-compliant disabled-row preset.

by_design_clarifications.title: Row click opens new browser tab via window.open(_blank) instead of in-place SPA navigation
by_design_clarifications.note: Intentional UX choice — opening order/quote details in a new tab preserves the listing tab for the user.

by_design_clarifications.title: Ctrl+click and middle-click route through same window.open(_blank) handler
by_design_clarifications.note: Downstream consequence of intentional new-tab design — every click flavor produces the same new-tab result.

infrastructure_issues.title: Cloudflare Rocket Loader breaks all Storybook QA on vcst-qa-storybook.govirto.com
infrastructure_issues.resolution_note: Storybook retest 2026-05-06 confirmed Storybook fully operational, zero Rocket Loader interference. Cause of resolution: presumed cache eviction or Cloudflare Page Rule applied externally; not user-driven from this run.
infrastructure_issues.fix_hint_legacy: Cloudflare Page Rule for vcst-qa-storybook.govirto.com/* → Rocket Loader OFF. Or set data-cfasync=false on Storybook iframe scripts.

business_rules_verified: BL-ORD-005 (PASS — order numbers in list match detail URL)
BL-ORD-001 (PASS — order statuses render as human-readable labels)
business_rules_na: BL-ORD-007 (N/A — shipment status not rendered on order list)

exploratory.charter: Risk charter — confirm cross-browser parity of row-click behavior + probe modifier-key boundaries

consumer_regression_sweep.scope: All 11 VcTable consumers in vc-frontend (10 + component itself)
selection_action_modal: select-address-modal.vue (PASS_WITH_NOTES — explicit Select buttons mitigate row-pattern)
consumer_regression_sweep.bug2_scope: Real a11y bug applies only to orders.vue (row has role=button + tabindex=0). quotes.vue has role=null + tabindex=-1 — not a focusable activation target there.
